goal: Reject malformed LLM unified diffs before git apply and expose security audit blockers in pending explanations.
assumptions: Repeated corrupt patch logs are caused by malformed model diff output.
Retry and full-file fallback behavior should remain available.
Auto-fix patch application targets one review issue file at a time.
risks: Overly strict validation could reject valid single-file edits.
Overly loose validation could allow cross-file patches.
Security blockers could remain difficult to diagnose if not included in pending explanations.
steps: Write failing regression tests for malformed patch fragments.
Add unified diff preflight in the repo apply path.
Add security findings to pending explanations.
